Sns.Subject: ALARM: ai-log-analyzer-high-error-rate
Sns.Message: {"AlarmName":"ai-log-analyzer-high-error-rate","AlarmDescription":"Lambda error rate exceeded threshold","NewStateValue":"ALARM","NewStateReason":"Threshold Crossed: 2 datapoints were greater than the threshold (10.0)","StateChangeTime":"2024-01-01T12:00:00.000+0000","Region":"ap-south-1","Trigger":{"MetricName":"Errors","Namespace":"AWS/Lambda","Dimensions":[{"name":"FunctionName","value":"my-test-app"}],"Period":60,"EvaluationPeriods":2,"Threshold":10.0,"ComparisonOperator":"GreaterThanThreshold"}}
